summary: Tested the tasks-table column alignment fix in ProjectDetail. Verified that the extra <td> date_start_planned has been removed, resulting in correct 11-column alignment.
critical_code_review_comments: Col9 (JH prévus) displays a plain number (e.g. '240') without 'JH' suffix — per code this is expected as `{t.jh_planned > 0 ? t.jh_planned : '—'}`. Minor cosmetic inconsistency vs Col10 which shows 'JH'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks table in ProjectDetail now has 11 correctly aligned columns: RAG | Nom | Type | Statut | Fin prévue | Fin réelle | Budget prévu (K€) | Budget landing (K€) | JH prévus | JH landing | Responsable. Col5 shows date in French format (e.g. '31 mars 2025'). Col7=Budget prévu in K€. Totals row verified with 6 cells (colSpan=6 label + 4 data cells + 1 empty). Fix from iteration_3 (extra date_start_planned td) confirmed resolved.

test_results.headers_order: PASS - RAG, Nom, Type, Statut, Fin prévue, Fin réelle, Budget prévu, Budget landing, JH prévus, JH landing, Responsable
test_results.col5_fin_prevue: PASS - '31 mars 2025' is a date (French locale format)
test_results.col9_jh_prevus: INFO - displays number only '240' (no JH suffix - minor)
test_results.totals_row: PASS - Budget prévu: 780 K€, Budget landing: 773 K€ (99%), JH prévus: 1560 JH, JH landing: 1545 JH (99%)
